# UseZombie — Agent Delivery Control Plane

## Machine-readable API surfaces
- OpenAPI spec: /openapi.json
- Agent manifest: /agents (JSON-LD)
- Skill description: /skill.md
- Health/status: /heartbeat
- Documentation: /docs

## API base
https://usezombie.com/v1

## Operations (operationId: method path)
- start_run: POST /v1/runs
- get_run: GET /v1/runs/{run_id}
- retry_run: POST /v1/runs/{run_id}:retry
- pause_workspace: POST /v1/workspaces/{workspace_id}:pause
- list_specs: GET /v1/specs?workspace_id={id}
- sync_specs: POST /v1/workspaces/{workspace_id}:sync

## Authentication
Bearer token: Authorization: Bearer <api_key>

## Run lifecycle
SPEC_QUEUED → RUN_PLANNED → PATCH_IN_PROGRESS → PATCH_READY →
VERIFICATION_IN_PROGRESS → (PASS) PR_PREPARED → PR_OPENED → NOTIFIED → DONE
                          → (FAIL) VERIFICATION_FAILED → retry → BLOCKED

## Agent pipeline
Echo (planner, read-only) → Scout (builder, full access) → Warden (validator, read+test)

## Artifacts per run
- plan.json (echo) — task plan
- implementation.md (scout) — what was built
- validation.md (warden) — tiered T1-T4 findings
- attempt_N_defects.md (warden) — defects on failure
- run_summary.md (orchestrator) — final summary with token totals
